title: potentilla californica var. elata
intro: Potentilla californica var. elata, also known as the tall cinquefoil or tall five-fingered clover, is a perennial plant in the rose family native to the western United States and Canada. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla californica var. elata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it has also been used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
